title: Craptimization
description: Optimization And Crap That Optifine Has And Some PVP stuff
body: This Mod Pack Optimizes Some Stuff And Dose Other Crap Like Showing your cordaniates showing your potions. Has some support of what Optifine does. Helps reduce lag and improves frame rate. lets you see and add costome capes, has some assteic stuff. has your armour to the side of your off hand.
